title: GPT-5.4, The Lobster, and The End of the World
tweets:
🦞 EP.003: "Will the Lobster Take Your Job?"

GPT-5.4 drops. An AI project called 'Lobster' (OpenClaw) gets 240K GitHub stars in 2 weeks. A 7,000-word essay crashes the stock market by 800 Dow points.

My daughter: "Dad... I graduate in exactly that year."

Me: speechless. 🧵

🤖 GPT-5.4's numbers made me stop:

• 1M token context (= reading 10 novels simultaneously)
• Direct computer control: mouse, browser, forms
• Beats real humans in 44 professions — 83% of the time

The other 17%? That's the most important number.
That's where humans live.

📉 "The 2028 Intelligence Crisis" essay:

→ Ghost GDP: AI profits skip workers
→ S&P drops 38%, unemployment hits 10.2%
→ Published. Crashed the Dow 800 pts.

The essay proves humans still matter. 🌀

"We couldn't NOT write it."

AI writes the words. Not the compulsion.

🔥 3 Contrarian Bets:

1️⃣ Best opp: the AI↔physical world pipeline. AI doesn't know your home.

2️⃣ Most valuable trait: curiosity. The irrational question only YOU would ask.

3️⃣ Human irrationality = evolution's true engine. #Lingji

AI replaces 83%. The 17%? Irreplaceable.
